anonymizedText:
[CANDIDATE_NAME] — Senior QA Engineer with 6 years experience.
Skills: Playwright, TypeScript, CI pipelines at [COMPANY_1].
Led test automation for a payments API; no performance or load testing mentioned.

profile.name: Senior QA Engineer
profile.description: Own test strategy and automation for a B2B SaaS product.

response.match_summary: Strong Playwright and TypeScript fit; gap on k6 load testing.

questions.question: Playwright and API testing are present but k6 experience is missing. How would you load-test the payments API?
questions.rationale: k6 is listed in expected skills; anonymized CV text does not mention load or performance testing.
questions.suggested_answer: Describe k6 scripts, thresholds, and running them in CI.

questions.question: You mention leading test automation at [COMPANY_1] — what outcomes did Playwright coverage improve?
questions.rationale: Playwright is cited without measurable results.
